**Game version**
(can be found in the bottom left corner on the main menu)

**What happened?**
(describe what happened, and what you expected to happen)

**Steps to reproduce**
(if able, how can i reproduce it?)

**Screenshots and videos**
(if possible, include screenshots and videos of the bug happening)

**System info**
(if you want, what hardware and OS are you using?)
